versions.summary: Smarter sidebar: workspaces collapse by default when they have one terminal, auto-expand when a second is added, and show a moon icon when idle. Clicking a focused workspace toggles collapse; clicking an unfocused one just activates it. Single-tab workspaces start collapsed. Inline .termic.yaml editing for scripts and sandbox settings with a .termic.yaml / Personal toggle. Live syntax-highlighted code preview in Appearance settings. Sandbox bypass-permissions preference. Remove the one-agent-per-repo-root limit. No spellcheck on rename inputs.

Broadcast commands to multiple agents concurrently with the new Megaphone dialog (⇧⌘B), explore codebases with a premium file explorer featuring Sublime-style preview tabs, and customize your editor using 8 syntax themes and razor-sharp static typography. Also resolves a macOS sandbox crash and connection blocks for the Antigravity agent, while adding standard Google hosts to the baseline sandbox allowlist for Gemini and Antigravity.

Sharper keyboard focus for terminal tabs — closing a tab keeps focus in the same pane, new tabs grab focus on spawn, and ⌘T opens the new-tab menu. Also fixes a doubled border on the collapsed Setup/Run footer.
Self-update in-app prompts and a detailed Changelog dialog are now live, alongside optimized, decoupled terminal rendering logic.
Characters missing from your chosen terminal font now fall back to the bundled JetBrains Mono instead of a thinner, mismatched system face.
Esc now closes the Settings panel in two deliberate steps, and the sandbox grants the Antigravity agent access to ~/.gemini.
Save files straight from the built-in editor with a dirty-state indicator, use the new Antigravity CLI, and open plain shell tabs alongside your agents.
